title: pelargonium longipes
intro: Pelargonium longipes is a species of succulent plant in the family Geraniaceae, commonly known as the South African pelargoniums. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. The health benefits of Pelargonium longipes include its antimicrobial and antiviral properties, which can help to boost the immune system and fight off infections. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium longipes can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat respiratory issues, coughs, and sore throats.
